{% for list_type in ['A-Jewelry', 'B-Jewelry', 'B-Non Jewelry', 'Agreement to Sell'] %}

{{ list_type }} List

{% set ns = namespace(total=0, count=0) %}{% for row in doc.turnover_items %}{% if row.list_type == list_type %}{% set ns.total = ns.total + (row.amount or 0) %}{% set ns.count = ns.count + 1 %}{% endif %}{% endfor %}
Document No: {{ doc.name }} - {{ list_type }} List
Inventory TrackerCustomer Name{% if list_type == 'Agreement to Sell' %}Form No{% else %}Pawn Ticket{% endif %}Item Description{% if list_type == 'Agreement to Sell' %}Total Value{% else %}Principal{% endif %}DateMaturityExpiry
{{ row.inventory_tracker or '' }}{{ row.customer_name or '' }}{{ row.reference_no or '' }}{{ row.item_description or '' }}{{ row.amount or 0 }}{{ frappe.format(row.date_of_sale or row.date_loan_granted, {'fieldtype':'Date'}) if (row.date_of_sale or row.date_loan_granted) else '' }}{{ frappe.format(row.maturity_date, {'fieldtype':'Date'}) if row.maturity_date else '' }}{{ frappe.format(row.expiry_date, {'fieldtype':'Date'}) if row.expiry_date else '' }}
Total Count{{ ns.count }}Total{{ ns.total }}
{% endfor %}
name: VC Turnover Checklist
